text: I feel a sense of eager curiosity as I enter this modern, thoughtfully designed space. There is a sterile calmness in the hallway outside—a quiet anticipation one finds in institutions of learning or creativity. Stepping closer to the vibrant "R+D" wall, my mind is stimulated by the energy of innovation radiating from the colors, the displays, and the words describing the interplay of humans and intelligent machines. I feel engaged and intrigued, ready to ponder the evolving relationship between humanity and technology.
